rule.name: LM_CalculateWorkingDays
rule.description: Calculates the number of working days between start and end dates, excluding weekends and public holidays for leave requests.

namedTypedValue.name: startDate
namedTypedValue.description: Start date of the leave request period

namedTypedValue.name: endDate
namedTypedValue.description: End date of the leave request period

namedTypedValue.name: publicHolidays
namedTypedValue.description: List of public holiday dates to exclude from working days calculation
